// The Self-Improvement Game

PROVE
IT.

Turn self-improvement into a real-life game.

Build discipline. Earn aura. Complete missions. Climb the rank ladder. Every action you take becomes your stats.

⚡ Download Soon 🔥 Join The Challenge
Scroll
// Features

Discipline,
Gamified.

Every tool you need to prove yourself — daily, consistently, relentlessly.

⚡
Daily Missions

Six curated missions every day shaped by your goals. Complete them. Don't quit. Your consistency becomes your identity.

🔥
Streak System

Build a chain of winning days. Your streak is a public record of your discipline. Break it, and start over stronger.

✨
Aura Points

Every completed mission earns you Aura — your personal power score. High-risk missions multiply your gains. Low effort is punished.

🏆
Rank Progression

Rise from Unproven to Legend. Your rank is visible, earned through real effort, and cannot be faked or bought.

🎯
Achievement Unlocks

Unlock hidden achievements as you reach milestones. Each badge represents a real-world discipline win.

📊
Discipline Tracking

Radar chart across Body, Mind, Faith, Social, Work, and Discipline. See exactly where you're weak — then fix it.

⏱️
Focus Sessions

Timed mission execution with status levels: Begin → Good → Great → Elite → End. Stay locked in. Don't break.

🛡️
Urge War System

Track and defeat your addictions. Abstinence timers for every vice. Your battle is recorded, your resistance measured.

🌱
Habit Building

Choose mission types that align with your lifestyle — Gym & Fitness, Religion & Spirit, Life & Growth. Your path, your rules.

💬
Motivational Quotes

"You say you're different. Prove it." Raw, unfiltered motivation built into every screen. No fluff. Only truth.

// App Preview

Built For
Champions.

Dark. Minimal. Brutal. Every screen is designed to keep you locked in and honest.

// About PROVE IT
"You say you're different.
Prove it."

PROVE IT was built for people who are tired of motivation that fades and promises they never keep. This app turns your daily discipline into a real-life game — with missions, aura points, ranks, streaks, and an honest system that records your truth. Whether you're fighting addictions, building fitness, strengthening your faith, or simply becoming more focused — PROVE IT holds you accountable. No shortcuts. No participation trophies. Only results.

Developed by Auric Studio, PROVE IT is a productivity and self-improvement application designed for individuals who want structure, gamification, and brutal honesty in their daily routine. Your aura is earned through actions, your rank reflects your consistency, and your stats tell the real story of who you are.

6 Daily Missions
10+ Rank Tiers
∞ Aura Potential
// Legal

Privacy Policy

Last updated: May 2026

Overview

PROVE IT ("the App") is developed by Auric Studio. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect information when you use our mobile application. By using the App, you agree to the terms described herein.

Data We Collect

  • Onboarding preferences (name, religion, goals, wake time) — stored locally on your device
  • Mission completion data, aura points, streaks, and stats — stored locally
  • Addiction tracking timers and abstinence data — stored locally on device only
  • App usage analytics (anonymous, aggregated) — via Firebase Analytics
  • Crash reports and performance data — via Firebase Crashlytics

Advertising (AdMob)

The App uses Google AdMob to display advertisements. AdMob may collect and use data including device identifiers, usage data, and location data to serve personalized or contextual ads. You may opt out of personalized ads through your device settings. For more information, see Google's Privacy Policy at policies.google.com/privacy.

Analytics

We use Firebase Analytics to understand how users interact with the App. This data is anonymized and used solely to improve the App experience. We do not sell analytics data to third parties.

Local Storage

All personal progress data (missions, aura, streaks, rank, addictions) is stored locally on your device using AsyncStorage. We do not transmit this data to our servers. Uninstalling the app will permanently delete all local data.

Children's Privacy

PROVE IT is not directed at children under 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children. If you believe a child has provided us with personal information, please contact us immediately.

Contact

For privacy inquiries, contact us at: auricstudio.dev@gmail.com

// Legal

Terms & Conditions

Last updated: May 2026

Acceptance of Terms

By downloading, installing, or using PROVE IT, you agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions. If you do not agree, do not use the App.

User Responsibilities

  • You are solely responsible for the accuracy of your self-reported mission completions
  • You agree to use the App honestly — the system tracks your word against your actions
  • You must be at least 13 years of age to use this App
  • You are responsible for maintaining the security of your device and app data

Prohibited Conduct

  • Reverse engineering, decompiling, or tampering with the App
  • Attempting to manipulate aura points, ranks, or streaks through unauthorized means
  • Using the App for any unlawful, harmful, or abusive purpose
  • Reproducing, distributing, or selling App content without written permission

Content Ownership

All content within PROVE IT — including mission structures, rank systems, UI designs, branding, and copy — is the intellectual property of Auric Studio. All rights reserved. User-generated data (your stats, progress) belongs to you and is stored locally on your device.

App Availability

Auric Studio makes no guarantees regarding continuous availability of the App. We reserve the right to modify, suspend, or discontinue the App at any time without prior notice. We are not liable for any loss of data resulting from App discontinuation.

Disclaimer of Warranties

PROVE IT is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. Auric Studio does not guarantee specific results from using the App. Discipline, growth, and improvement are entirely dependent on the user's own efforts and commitment.

Limitation of Liability

Auric Studio shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of the App. Our maximum liability is limited to the amount you paid for the App (which is free).

Changes to Terms

We may update these Terms at any time. Continued use of the App after changes constitutes acceptance of the new Terms. Check this page periodically for updates.
